title: New Feature Request - Column alignment
excerpt: We would like to request a new feature that allows users to adjust the alignment of columns, such as left-aligned or right-aligned. Currently, all columns are centered, making it difficult to visually identify certain in…

posts.author: laujenni (Lau Jen Ni )
posts.cookedHtml: We would like to request a new feature that allows users to adjust the alignment of columns, such as left-aligned or right-aligned. Currently, all columns are centered, making it difficult to visually identify certain information, such as numerical data.

posts.author: Marty01 (Marty)
posts.cookedHtml:
@laujenni - there is an existing feature request for this, so please go and vote for it too so hopefully the monday.com team start to listen!
Left / Right text align
